examples: They need to immunise teams against group-think: Hackman argued that the best ones contain "deviant" who are willing to do something that may be upsetting to others.
They need to immunise teams against group-think: Hackman argued that the best ones contain "deviants" who are willing to do something that may be upsetting to others.
When people have no pre-existing immunity to a flu virus, they need not just one but two doses of vaccine several weeks apart - making it very hard to immunise many people in time to protect them.
They set up clinics in local villages and started to immunise children against tetanus and measles.
But what nobody did was immunise those children who didn't get vaccinated when they were due between 1998 and 2008.
